widget.name: Convey Stepper
widget.description: Configurable horizontal stepper with header, clickable steps, and theme colors

property.caption: Active step
property.description: 1-based index of the current step (steps before this are completed)

property.caption: Steps
property.description: Configure each step. Enabled steps can be clicked to run On click.

property.caption: Caption
property.description: Text shown next to the step badge when this step is active

property.caption: Enabled
property.description: When false, the step is not clickable

property.caption: On click
property.description: Action executed when an enabled step is clicked

property.caption: Show header
property.description: Show the title bar above the stepper

property.caption: Title
property.description: Header title text (e.g. Inbound Call Process)

property.caption: Icon
property.description: Optional header icon. A phone icon is used when empty.

property.caption: Show pop-out button
property.description: Show the external/pop-out action in the header

property.caption: On pop-out
property.description: Action when the pop-out button is clicked

property.caption: Show close button
property.description: Show the close action in the header

property.caption: On close
property.description: Action when the close button is clicked

property.caption: Completed color
property.description: Color for completed steps and connectors

property.caption: Active color
property.description: Color for the active step node and Step badge

property.caption: Pending fill color
property.description: Fill color for pending step nodes

property.caption: Pending border color
property.description: Border color for pending step nodes

property.caption: Text color
property.description: Color for captions and header title

property.caption: Header background
property.description: Background color of the header bar
